zh.title: 以西结异象全集 - 旧约先知以西结的预言与验证 | Ezekiel's Visions
zh.description: 旧约先知以西结在巴比伦流亡期间所见异象完整收录，涵盖宝座战车（Merkabah）、枯骨复生、歌革与玛各之战、新圣殿异象、耶路撒冷陷落、列国审判等预言，附历史验证分析。
zh.keywords: 以西结,以西结书,旧约预言,圣经预言,Merkabah,宝座战车,枯骨复生,歌革玛各,新圣殿,耶路撒冷陷落,先知以西结
zh.ogTitle: 以西结异象全集 | Ezekiel's Visions
zh.ogDescription: 旧约先知以西结在巴比伦流亡期间的预言异象完整收录，涵盖宝座战车、枯骨复生、歌革与玛各之战、新圣殿等，附历史验证。
zh.twitterDescription: 以西结书预言全集：宝座战车异象、枯骨复生、歌革与玛各之战、新圣殿蓝图，附历史验证分析。

en.title: Ezekiel's Visions - Old Testament Prophecies from the Exiled Priest | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Complete collection of visions from the Old Testament prophet Ezekiel, written during the Babylonian exile (~590 BC). Covers the Merkabah throne-chariot, valley of dry bones, Gog and Magog, the new Temple, fall of Jerusalem, and judgments on nations.
en.keywords: Ezekiel,Book of Ezekiel,Old Testament prophecy,Bible prophecy,Merkabah,throne chariot,dry bones,Gog Magog,new Temple,fall of Jerusalem,prophet Ezekiel
en.ogTitle: Ezekiel's Visions - Old Testament Prophecies from the Exiled Priest
en.ogDescription: Complete collection of the prophet Ezekiel's visions from the Babylonian exile. Includes the Merkabah, valley of dry bones, Gog and Magog, the new Temple, and historical verification.
en.twitterDescription: Ezekiel's prophecies: the throne-chariot vision, valley of dry bones, Gog and Magog war, new Temple blueprint, with historical verification.
